entries.name: Glycolysis / Gluconeogenesis
entries.description: Central carbon metabolism. High abundance in active microbial communities.

entries.name: Citrate cycle (TCA cycle)
entries.description: Energy metabolism core pathway. Indicator of aerobic metabolism.

entries.name: Pentose phosphate pathway
entries.description: Biosynthesis of nucleotides and NADPH. Important in stress response.

entries.name: Oxidative phosphorylation
entries.description: Electron transport chain. Presence indicates aerobic respiration capacity.

entries.name: Photosynthesis
entries.description: Carbon fixation via photosystems. Marker of phototrophic organisms in environmental samples.

entries.name: Purine metabolism
entries.description: Nucleotide biosynthesis. Ubiquitous in active microbial communities.

entries.name: Pyrimidine metabolism
entries.description: Nucleotide biosynthesis. Relevant for activity metrics.

entries.name: Alanine, aspartate and glutamate metabolism
entries.description: Amino acid synthesis. Links carbon and nitrogen metabolism.

entries.name: Glycine, serine and threonine metabolism
entries.description: One-carbon metabolism. Important in methanogens and soil bacteria.

entries.name: Cysteine and methionine metabolism
entries.description: Sulfur amino acid metabolism. Relevant for sulfur cycling metagenomes.

entries.name: Lysine biosynthesis
entries.description: Essential amino acid production. Marker of auxotrophic interactions.

entries.name: Phenylalanine metabolism
entries.description: Aromatic compound degradation. Relevant in soil and wastewater metagenomes.

entries.name: Starch and sucrose metabolism
entries.description: Polysaccharide degradation. Important in gut and soil microbiomes.

entries.name: Amino sugar and nucleotide sugar metabolism
entries.description: Cell wall biosynthesis. Relevant for peptidoglycan production.

entries.name: Lipopolysaccharide biosynthesis
entries.description: LPS production in gram-negative bacteria. Endotoxin precursor biosynthesis.

entries.name: Peptidoglycan biosynthesis
entries.description: Cell wall synthesis. Target for beta-lactam antibiotics.

entries.name: Pyruvate metabolism
entries.description: Central metabolic hub connecting glycolysis and TCA.

entries.name: Glyoxylate and dicarboxylate metabolism
entries.description: Important in methylotrophic and lithoautotrophic bacteria.

entries.name: Butanoate metabolism
entries.description: Short-chain fatty acid production. Key pathway in gut microbiome health.

entries.name: C5-Branched dibasic acid metabolism
entries.description: Branched fatty acid metabolism. Important in Bacillus and Clostridium.

entries.name: One carbon pool by folate
entries.description: Methyl group transfer. Linked to methanogenesis and acetogenesis.

entries.name: Methane metabolism
entries.description: Methanogenesis and methane oxidation. Key in anaerobic environments.

entries.name: Carbon fixation in photosynthetic organisms
entries.description: Autotrophic carbon fixation. Key in marine and soil metagenomes.

entries.name: Carbon fixation pathways in prokaryotes
entries.description: Diverse CO2 fixation strategies (CBB, rTCA, WL). Chemolithoautotrophy marker.

entries.name: Thiamine metabolism
entries.description: Vitamin B1 biosynthesis. Relevant for cross-feeding interactions.

entries.name: Riboflavin metabolism
entries.description: Vitamin B2. Important for electron transfer chains.

entries.name: Nicotinate and nicotinamide metabolism
entries.description: NAD+ biosynthesis. Energy metabolism.

entries.name: Biotin metabolism
entries.description: Fatty acid synthesis cofactor. Marker of community-level complementarity.

entries.name: Terpenoid backbone biosynthesis
entries.description: Isoprenoid production. Relevant in archaea and specialized bacteria.

entries.name: Nitrogen metabolism
entries.description: Nitrification, denitrification, nitrogen fixation. Key in nitrogen cycling metagenomes.

entries.name: Sulfur metabolism
entries.description: Sulfur oxidation and reduction. Key in hydrothermal, marine, and soil environments.

entries.name: Caprolactam degradation
entries.description: Xenobiotic degradation. Pollution remediation marker.

entries.name: Carbon metabolism
entries.description: Integrated carbon metabolism overview. Most comprehensive functional summary.

entries.name: ABC transporters
entries.description: Nutrient uptake systems. Reflects substrate availability and community nutrition.

entries.name: Two-component system
entries.description: Signal transduction. Environmental sensing capability.

entries.name: Quorum sensing
entries.description: Cell density-dependent gene regulation. Community-level coordination.

entries.name: Bacterial chemotaxis
entries.description: Motility and environmental response. Active community indicator.
